## Install

op-who is a notarized, Developer ID–signed macOS app. Install it with Homebrew:

```bash
brew install --cask stigsb/tap/op-who
```

Or download `op-who.zip` from the assets below, unzip it, and drag `op-who.app` to `/Applications`. For managed/MDM fleets, the signed `op-who-<version>.pkg` installer is attached too.

After install, grant Accessibility once: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Accessibility → enable "op-who".
